categories.name: ARE YOU READY FOR SOME MONDAY NIGHT FOOTBALL?

questions.clue: In 2016 "MNF" aired its first game from outside the U.S. as the Raiders beat the Texans in this city's Estadio Azteca

final.clue: In a hint of the future, in 1973 Marjorie Post gave it to the U.S. govt. as a warm-weather presidential retreat, but it was returned
